name: hermes-agent
limitations: Runtime-specific agent wiring and packaging remains external while JSON contracts are available.
Bundle metadata is emitted as generated import bundle metadata in targetRender.hermes-agent.payload; runtime-specific agent wiring remains external.
Current non-CLI support is a generated import bundle, not a native marketplace installer.

bundle.importInstructions: Use the release bundle at bundles/hermes-agent/<pack>/ and import the included assignment, role, skill, and lifecycle files into the host workflow.
